content: Combining the dynamic self-reflection memory architecture of Reflexion with the iterative output polishing framework of Self-Refine reveals a two-tier self-improvement system for autonomous agents, where global memory-based reflection corrects long-term strategic errors that local iterative output refinement misses. This layered approach addresses a key limitation of single-layer self-improvement methods: getting stuck in local optima from only refining individual outputs without updating core decision-making patterns.
